name: Book of Minor Magic
description: A slim primer containing the basics of magical combat.

name: Book of Fire
description: Warm to the touch. Its pages smell faintly of ash.

name: Book of Transmutation
description: Leather-bound notes on the art of changing matter.

name: Book of Summoning
description: A tome of binding rites and familiar spirits.

name: Book of Earth
description: Heavy granite plates bound in iron. Each page is a stone slab.

name: Book of Power
description: A forbidden grimoire. Its text shifts when unobserved.

name: Book of Ice
description: Bound in blue leather that never warms to the touch. Each page glistens with rime.

name: Book of Venom
description: Stained and pungent, bound in something leathery. The illustrations writhe.

name: Book of the Storm
description: Crackles with static when handled. The ink shifts between raindrops and lightning.
